# PursTech
> The World's Largest Free Tool Ecosystem. Stop Searching. Start Doing.

PursTech is a free online tool platform providing 10,000+ utilities for text processing,
image editing, developer tools, SEO, AI-powered tasks, finance calculations, security
and PDF management. No login required. No ads on tools. Powered by AI.

## Site

- Homepage: https://purstech.com
- All Tools: https://purstech.com/tools
- Blog: https://purstech.com/blog

## Categories

- Text Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/text
- Image Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/image
- Developer Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/dev
- SEO Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/seo
- AI Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/ai
- Finance Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/finance
- Security Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/security
- PDF Tools: https://purstech.com/categories/pdf

## Live Tools

### Text Tools
- Word Counter: https://purstech.com/tools/word-counter
- Case Converter: https://purstech.com/tools/case-converter
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: https://purstech.com/tools/lorem-ipsum
- Diff Checker: https://purstech.com/tools/diff-checker
- Text to Speech: https://purstech.com/tools/text-to-speech

### Developer Tools
- JSON Formatter: https://purstech.com/tools/json-formatter
- Base64 Encoder: https://purstech.com/tools/base64-encoder
- URL Encoder: https://purstech.com/tools/url-encoder
- UUID Generator: https://purstech.com/tools/uuid-generator
- QR Code Generator: https://purstech.com/tools/qr-code-generator
- Hash Generator: https://purstech.com/tools/hash-generator
- CSS Minifier: https://purstech.com/tools/css-minifier
- HTML Minifier: https://purstech.com/tools/html-minifier

### Image Tools
- Color Picker: https://purstech.com/tools/color-picker

### Security Tools
- Password Generator: https://purstech.com/tools/password-generator

### Finance Tools
- Age Calculator: https://purstech.com/tools/age-calculator
- BMI Calculator: https://purstech.com/tools/bmi-calculator
- Percentage Calculator: https://purstech.com/tools/percentage-calculator
- Unit Converter: https://purstech.com/tools/unit-converter
- Currency Converter: https://purstech.com/tools/currency-converter

## About

- Founder: Independent developer
- Technology: Next.js, Supabase, Vercel, Claude AI
- Business model: Free tools + optional Pro tier ($7/month)
- Contact: contact@purstech.com
